column1: # SPEC-PEER-REVIEW.md §6.12). One provider per line, tab-separated:
# list_models_script/run_script are filenames resolved relative to this
# file's own directory (plugins/peer-review/scripts/). Leave a script column
# empty if that provider's backend isn't implemented yet -- providers.sh
# reports it as unavailable, provider-dispatch.sh degrades gracefully
# instead of executing a missing file.
# Adding a provider is exactly one line here -- no script in this plugin
# Blank lines and lines starting with # are ignored.
